studyName: A Whole Genome Association Search for Type 2 Diabetes Genes in African Americans

tables.description: Subject ID, race, age, gender, BMI, consent form(s) signed by participants, age of type 2 diabetes Mellitus diagnosis, age of end stage renal disease diagnosis, age of hypertension diagnosis, duration of type 2 diabetes Mellitus since diagnosis, individual has reported that he/she is on dialysis, individual has reported hypertension, individual has diabetic retinopathy reported by ophthalmologist or laser treatment with photocoagulation, HBA1C, pc1, pc2, pc3, pc4, pc5, pc6, pc7, pc8, pc9, and pc10 of participants with T2D and involved in the "A Whole Genome Association Search for Type 2 Diabetes Genes in African Americans" project.

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age at recruitment

variables.name: BMI
variables.description: Body Mass Index

variables.name: Consent
variables.description: Consent form(s) signed by participant

variables.name: Duration T2DM
variables.description: Duration of T2DM (Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus) since diagnosis

variables.name: ESRD
variables.description: Individual has reported that he/she is on dialysis

variables.name: ESRD Age of Onset
variables.description: Age of ESRD (End Stage Renal Disease) diagnosis, start of dialysis

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Gender of participant has been confirmed with genotyping: 1 = Male, 2 = Female

variables.name: HBA1C
variables.description: Hemoglobin1AC, test

variables.name: HTN
variables.description: Individual has self reported hypertension (yes, no, unknown)

variables.name: HTN Age of Onset
variables.description: Age of hypertension diagnosis

variables.name: Race
variables.description: Race, ethnicity of participant

variables.name: Retinopathy
variables.description: Individual has diabetic retinopathy reported by ophthalmologist or laser treatment with photocoagulation

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: T2DM Age of Onset
variables.description: Age of T2DM (Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus) diagnosis

variables.name: pc1
variables.description: Principal component 1: a mathematical tool commonly used in statistical analysis. It seeks to identify an orthogonal coordinate system that transforms a number of possibly correlated variables into a smaller number of uncorrelated variables called principal components (PC). This method allows for the separation of individuals on the basis of differences in their properties and can also be used to evaluate the properties that contribute the most to these separations. The principal components are ordered in terms of the amount of variation in the dataset that they explain such that the first PC explains the largest fraction of the total variance, and so on. There exist a number of methods to determine the number of PC to be retained for a specific analysis. However, none of them uniformly dominates the others. Following a practice largely adopted in the field, we present the first 10 PC computed on this dataset.

tables.description: Subject ID, race, age, gender, BMI, fasting blood sugar, consent form(s) signed by participant, participant is fasting when he has not had anything to eat or drink 12 hours prior to blood draw, pc1, pc2, pc3, pc4, pc5, pc6, pc7, pc8, pc9, and pc10 of participants without T2D and involved in the "A Whole Genome Association Search for Type 2 Diabetes Genes in African Americans" project.

variables.description: Body Mass Index

variables.description: Consent form(s) signed by participant

variables.name: FBS
variables.description: Fasting Blood Sugar

variables.name: Fasting status
variables.description: Participant is fasting when he has not had anything to eat or drink 12 hours prior to blood draw.

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Gender of participant has been confirmed with genotyping: 1 = Male, 2 = Female

variables.name: Race
variables.description: Race, ethnicity of participant

variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: Subject ID, family ID, mother ID, father ID, gender, and monozygotic tween ID of participants with of without T2D and involved in the "A Whole Genome Association Search for Type 2 Diabetes Genes in African Americans" project.

variables.name: FAMID
variables.description: Family ID

variables.name: FATHER
variables.description: Father's subject ID

variables.name: MOTHER
variables.description: Mother's subject ID

variables.name: MZ_TWIN_ID
variables.description: Twin ID

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Sex

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Unique subject ID

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site, and tumor status of participants with or without T2D and involved in the "A Whole Genome Association Search for Type 2 Diabetes Genes in African Americans" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID
